1.0.1.en: Node.js version. Manual IP and serial entry. Supports single-phase string inverters (2 and 4 MPPT).

1.2.0.en: Complete rewrite in Python using the Homey Pro Python runtime. Automatic UDP discovery — no IP or serial needed. Auto-detects inverter model by probing registers. Dynamic capabilities — only sensors with real data are shown. Supports 4 models: string (2/4 MPPT), microinverter, hybrid, and SG04LP3 3-phase hybrid. Night backoff using local sunrise/sunset. Tested on Deye SUN-9K-G03 with LSW3 logger.

1.2.2.en: Fixed TCP polling on Homey Pro — replaced pysolarmanv5 with a built-in SolarmanV5 transport that avoids multiprocessing semaphores blocked by the Homey sandbox. Added Wi-Fi SSID and signal strength to device settings. Improved unavailability detection during daytime failures.

1.2.3.en: Localized pairing UI in 10 languages (EN, NL, DE, FR, IT, SV, NO, ES, DA, PL). Pair screens now use Homey i18n.

1.2.4.en: Added full UI localization for pairing views

1.2.5.en: Fixed settings not being applied — polling interval and connection settings now update correctly.

1.2.6.en: Rebuilt Python packages with latest runtime for improved compatibility.

1.2.7.en: Fixed Energy Dashboard for hybrid inverters: battery now visible in the energy overview, and solar production correctly shows PV input power (PV1+PV2) instead of AC output (which includes battery discharge).

1.2.8.en: Two-device architecture for hybrid inverters: inverter and battery now appear as separate devices in Homey, enabling proper Energy Dashboard integration (battery SOC, charge/discharge energy). Battery device keeps polling through the night while the inverter goes offline. Added flow cards: triggers for solar production started/stopped, grid lost/restored, and data updated (with power, daily production, battery SOC and grid power tokens). Conditions: is solar producing, is battery charging, is feeding to grid. Re-pairing required for all existing devices.

1.2.9.en: Restored pysolarmanv5 library with a sandbox compatibility patch (fixes multiprocessing semaphore error on Homey Pro). Fixed hybrid inverter night backoff — hybrid stays online 24/7 via battery and no longer shows zeroed values at night. Fixed string/micro inverters being incorrectly marked as unavailable when the logger loses power at night (expected behaviour). Re-pairing required for hybrid inverters to apply the night fix.

1.2.10.en: Reverted to built-in V5 transport — pysolarmanv5 caused app crashes on Homey Pro (background task exception in Python 3.14). All fixes from 1.2.9 are preserved: hybrid night backoff, string/micro night handling, and is_hybrid flag. Re-pairing required for hybrid inverters.
